title: Torrubia inermis
taxonomy: Torrubia inermis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Paeoniaceae. It belongs to the genus Torrubia. The plant is native to the Himalayas, China, and parts of Southeast Asia. Torrubia inermis is often found in mountainous regions at high elevations. Its classification is further refined within the family Paeoniaceae.
